title: Settings
description: Manage your account settings and preferences.
accountDesc: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language.
languageDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard
profileDesc: This is how others will see you on the site.
usernameDesc: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym. You can only change this once every 30 days.
emailPlaceholder: Select a verified email to display
emailDesc: You can manage verified email addresses in your email settings.
bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
bioDesc: You can @mention other users and organizations to link to them.
urlsDesc: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.
appearanceDesc: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.
fontDesc: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
themeDesc: Select the theme for the dashboard.
communicationEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity.
marketingEmailsDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
socialEmailsDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
securityEmailsDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
mobileSettings: Use different settings for my mobile devices
mobileSettingsDesc: You can manage your mobile notifications in the
displayDesc: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
sidebarDesc: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.
